## ODTIS-0000 - Reference Architecture {#reference-architecture}

Two-layer model, profile composition, conformance claim structure, and scope boundaries.

**10 IDs**

| ID | Legacy | Keyword | Requirement | Profile(s) | Test |
|----|--------|---------|-------------|------------|------|
| `ODTIS-0001` | `ODTIS-1.2.3` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must-not">MUST NOT</span> | Trust Network profile MUST NOT be claimed without Core Identity profile for the same operator scope | Reference Architecture | `test_layer2_requires_layer1.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reference-architecture/test_layer2_requires_layer1.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0002` | `ODTIS-1.7.0` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must-not">MUST NOT</span> | Federation profile MUST NOT be claimed without Trust Network profile for the same operator scope | Reference Architecture | `test_federation_requires_trust_network.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reference-architecture/test_federation_requires_trust_network.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0003` | `ODTIS-1.7.1` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Conformance claims MUST list every profile, Extended sub-module, and Reliance Extension sub-module satisfied | Reference Architecture | `test_profile_declaration_complete.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reference-architecture/test_profile_declaration_complete.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0004` | `ODTIS-1.7.2` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must-not">MUST NOT</span> | An implementation MUST NOT claim a profile unless all profiles in its depends_on chain are also claimed and satisfied | Reference Architecture | `test_profile_dependency_chain.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reference-architecture/test_profile_dependency_chain.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0005` | `ODTIS-1.7.5` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Conformance claims MUST name the ODTIS spec version against which requirements and tests were evaluated | Reference Architecture | `test_version_binding.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reference-architecture/test_version_binding.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0006` | `ODTIS-1.6.5` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must-not">MUST NOT</span> | Extended sub-modules MUST NOT weaken Core Identity, Trust Network, or Federation requirements | Reference Architecture | `test_extended_no_weakening.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reference-architecture/test_extended_no_weakening.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0007` | `ODTIS-1.9.3` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must-not">MUST NOT</span> | Implementations MUST NOT use prohibited ODTIS claims including ODTIS certified without statement, Full ODTIS without listing profiles, or eIDAS/QTSP equivalence from ODTIS alone | Reference Architecture | `test_prohibited_claims.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reference-architecture/test_prohibited_claims.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0008` | `ODTIS-1.9.1` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Conformance statements MUST include odtis_version, profiles, extended_modules, level, operator, scope, requirements reference, tests summary, date, and contact | Reference Architecture | `test_statement_minimum_fields.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reference-architecture/test_statement_minimum_fields.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0009` | `ODTIS-1.7.4` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must-not">MUST NOT</span> | Implementations MUST NOT imply Trust Network, Federation, Operator, or Extended conformance when only Core Identity is declared | Reference Architecture | `test_minimal_claim_no_implied_profiles.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reference-architecture/test_minimal_claim_no_implied_profiles.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0010` | `ODTIS-1.9.2` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Implementations MUST pass all applicable conformance tests for declared profiles and level, or mark tests partial and list pending test IDs without waiving MUST requirements | Reference Architecture | `test_applicable_tests_required.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reference-architecture/test_applicable_tests_required.md)) |

## ODTIS-0006 - Payment Trust Layer {#payment-trust-layer}

Reserved domain for payment-scoped trust extensions (out of ODTIS 0.9 scope).

_No normative requirements (reserved domain)._

## ODTIS-0007 - Reliance Extensions {#reliance-extensions}

Optional Capa B governance overlays (reliance/assurance/resilience profiles); catalogued in Annex E.

**55 IDs**

| ID | Legacy | Keyword | Requirement | Profile(s) | Test |
|----|--------|---------|-------------|------------|------|
| `ODTIS-0701` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | A reliance decision under any Reliance Extension MUST identify the relying party and its registered role before a trust signal is acted upon. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0701.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0701.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0702` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Each reliance decision MUST bind a declared purpose to every attribute or verdict consumed; use outside the declared purpose MUST be refused. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0702.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0702.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0703` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Each reliance decision MUST carry assurance metadata (assurance level and method) sufficient for the relying party risk tier. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0703.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0703.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0704` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Each reliance decision MUST emit a tamper-evident audit evidence reference that a supervisor can reconstruct after the fact. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0704.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0704.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0705` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Each Reliance Extension MUST define a recourse path for contested, failed, or wrongful decisions. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0705.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0705.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0706` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Each Reliance Extension MUST define revocation and step-up triggers where the underlying trust signal can change state. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0706.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0706.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0707` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must-not">MUST NOT</span> | A Reliance Extension MUST NOT weaken or relax any Core Identity, Trust Network, Federation, or Operator requirement. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0707.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0707.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0708` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | A conformance statement claiming Reliance Extensions MUST list each active sub-module and its deployment phase. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0708.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0708.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0710` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | An agent reliance decision MUST resolve a verifiable agent identifier bound to a named principal and an accountable human or organizational sponsor. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0710.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0710.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0711` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Delegated agent authority MUST be expressed as a signed mandate with allowed actions, prohibited actions, and value/time/session limits; each delegation hop MUST narrow scope and MUST NOT escalate privilege. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0711.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0711.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0712` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | A relying party MUST verify agent mandate revocation status within a declared freshness window before honoring a high-risk action, and MUST fail closed when status cannot be confirmed. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0712.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0712.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0713` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--should">SHOULD</span> | High-risk agent actions such as financial disbursement, identity changes, or regulatory filings SHOULD require an explicit human-anchor reference and step-up in the delegation chain. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0713.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0713.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0715` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | A long-lived credential profile MUST publish its algorithm set, hybrid status, and a documented rotation policy and deprecation trigger. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0715.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0715.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0716` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Relying-party acceptance criteria MUST be declared for classical, hybrid, and post-quantum assertion paths, with audit evidence retained per accepted path. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0716.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0716.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0717` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--should">SHOULD</span> | Issuers SHOULD maintain a cryptographic bill of materials (CBOM) and classify harvest-now-decrypt-later exposure by credential validity and data sensitivity. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0717.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0717.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0719` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | An identity lifecycle program MUST record both claimed and observed revocation SLA across every credential system that must fire on offboarding. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0719.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0719.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0720` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Revocation evidence MUST unify physical and digital credential status into a reconstructable audit reference per lifecycle event. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0720.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0720.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0721` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--should">SHOULD</span> | Operators SHOULD scan for orphan credentials and active sessions at defined intervals after a subject exit. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0721.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0721.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0723` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | A document verification reliance decision MUST declare capture mode (live SDK, upload, or hybrid) and the injection-detection and document-forensics tiers in scope. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0723.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0723.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0724` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Reusable document verification outcomes MUST carry capture-channel integrity and device/session risk evidence; upload-only paths MUST be policy-gated by risk tier. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0724.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0724.md)) |

| `ODTIS-0748` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Each fraud decision MUST record a liability owner and the legal basis for any cross-institution fraud-signal sharing. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0748.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0748.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0749` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--should">SHOULD</span> | A recourse path SHOULD be defined for wrongful blocks as well as for fraud victims. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0749.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0749.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0751` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | A CIP reliance decision MUST record the verifying institution, proofing method, assurance level, and reliance type (direct verification versus institutional reliance). | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0751.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0751.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0752` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Institutional reliance MUST reference an annual AML/CFT and CIP certification and MUST bind the decision to account-opening purpose. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0752.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0752.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0753` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--should">SHOULD</span> | A protocol-agnostic credential presentation envelope and an identity-error recourse path SHOULD be supported. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0753.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0753.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0755` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | A cross-border travel reliance decision MUST declare, per touchpoint, the relying party, purpose code, and allowed attribute set with an assurance-level mapping. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0755.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0755.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0756` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Attribute reuse across touchpoints MUST be bounded by a declared reuse policy (one-time, session-bound, or journey-bound). | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0756.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0756.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0757` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--should">SHOULD</span> | A recourse endpoint and cross-border recognition scope SHOULD be published per touchpoint. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0757.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0757.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0759` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | A software-supply-chain trust profile MUST attest manufacturer versus steward role and maintain SBOM provenance per release. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0759.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0759.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0760` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Active-exploit and severe-incident events MUST be recorded as a trust-event chain with corrective-measure and regulator-filing references and timestamps. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0760.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0760.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0761` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--should">SHOULD</span> | Post-market monitoring, a vulnerability-disclosure policy, and a component revocation path SHOULD be documented. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0761.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0761.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0763` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | A shared-infrastructure (DPI) trust profile MUST publish participant and relying-party authorization scoped per component, with blast-radius mapping of co-dependent services. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0763.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0763.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0764` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | A Trust Resilience Evidence Pack covering authorization, purpose, assurance, audit, revocation/step-up, recourse, and reporting MUST be maintained from pilot day one. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0764.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0764.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0765` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--should">SHOULD</span> | Security and incident metrics SHOULD be reported transparently to partners, regulators, and the public. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0765.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0765.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0767` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must">MUST</span> | Reliance on a sovereign or external identity-chain credential MUST document the chain operator accountability and issuer liability and revocation before mutual recognition. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0767.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0767.md)) |
| `ODTIS-0768` | `-` | <span class="odtis-kw odtis-kw--must-not">MUST NOT</span> | Technical interoperability with an external identity chain MUST NOT be treated as institutional trust transfer; cross-jurisdiction acceptance MUST declare assurance mapping, purpose binding, and a recourse path. | Reliance Extensions | `test_odtis_0768.md` ([repo](https://github.com/odtis/core-spec/blob/main/conformance/tests/reliance-extensions/test_odtis_0768.md)) |
